flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Harris-Stowe State University are 37% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($31.1k vs $49.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Harris-Stowe State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.1k vs 1.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Harris-Stowe State University fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 960).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Harris-Stowe State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.5k → $11.6k).
